steps.title: Match the definition's tense
steps.content: The sentence defines what an emulsifier is, so it uses present tense for a general fact. The verb in the relative clause must also describe the compound's ongoing function.

steps.title: Keep the verb in present tense
steps.content: A and B place the function in the past, and D describes a past action in progress. The simple present form fits a timeless definition and agrees with the singular noun compound. The answer is C.
